description: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets (PC) randomizer.

v1.0.0.description:
First public release of HP2PC_AP, an Archipelago multiworld randomizer for *Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets* (PC, 2002 KnowWonder release).

## Contents
- **108 items**: 7 spells (3 starter precollected) & 101 wizard cards
- **105 checks**: 4 spell-tutorial classrooms & 101 card pickups
- **Goal**: defeat the Basilisk (post-fight Great Hall walk-in fires the credits cutscene which goals).

## What's in the multiworld
- All 4 non-starter spells (Rictusempra, Skurge, Diffindo, Spongify) and every wizard card are shuffled.
- Mod-side bookcase blockers gate each spell-tutorial classroom until you receive the spell.
- Vendors keep selling missed cards as a beans-priced AP recovery path for un-replayable levels.
- HUD toast feedback for received and sent items.

## Install
Download all four assets below, then follow `PLAYER_SETUP.md`. Requires:
- HP2 retail (KnowWonder 2002)
- HP2Engine 3.4 (Metallicafan212's M212 patch, free, from the HP2 modding Discord)
- Archipelago framework (latest stable from archipelago.gg), tested with 0.6.7

## Known v1 limitations
- Boomslang / Bicorn / BitOGoyle flow through vanilla story progression (returning as AP items in v2)
- Bean filler is non-durable across client crashes
- Save-load detection across different multiworld slots not enforced (one save dir per seed recommended)

Issues / questions: ping Kryen in the Archipelago Discord.

v1.1.0.description:
## HP2PC_AP v1.1.0

  End-to-end playable with a much larger seed. Up to **276 checks** when every category toggle is on vs 105 in v1.0.

  ### Headline changes
  - **5 new check categories** wired end-to-end:
    - **109 secret areas** across every level (`enable_secrets`, default on)
    - **44 challenge stars** across the 4 spell-challenge levels (`enable_challenge_stars`, default on)
    - **10 ranked duels** at the Dueling Club (`enable_duelling`, default off)
    - **6 Quidditch matches** at the Quidditch pitch (`enable_quidditch_matches`, default off)
    - **2 Fred & George vendor upgrades**: Nimbus 2001 and Quidditch Armour (`enable_quidditch_upgrades`, default off)
  - **Per-category yaml toggles**: dial difficulty by enabling only the categories you want.
  - **Tier-prefixed card names**: AP item strings now read `Silver Card - Duke` instead of bare `Duke`, so other players can tell at a glance that you found a card.
  - **5 new filler types**: Massive Pile of Beans, Wiggenweld Potion, Wiggentree Bark, Flobberworm Mucous and Chocolate Frog.

  ### Quality-of-life
  - **One-click client launch.** The HP2 PC Client is now a button in ArchipelagoLauncher (next to your other AP clients), so you no longer need a separate `.exe` or a Python command line. Drop `harry_potter_2_pc.apworld` into `<Archipelago install>\custom_worlds\`, restart the launcher, and click **HP2 PC Client**, the Kivy GUI opens and you connect with `/connect <server>:<port>` as usual.
  - Spell-tutorial checks fire on lesson-**end** (after the wand-tracing minigame) instead of on classroom entry.
  - AP grant drains correctly pause while the in-game menu is open.
  - `start_inventory_from_pool` works for HP2 PC slots.
  - Chamber of Secrets Part 2 now correctly shows X/3 secrets in the pause menu (the unobtainable marker is removed at level load, base game ships 4 secrets but 1 is not findable).

  ### Upgrading from v1.0
  - Drop the new `HPArchipelago.u` and `harry_potter_2_pc.apworld` over your existing files (same locations as v1.0; see `PLAYER_SETUP.md`).
  - Regenerate the yaml template from ArchipelagoLauncher to pick up the new toggles, then copy your chosen settings into your slot yaml.
  - Existing v1.0 seeds keep working, no save format changed.

  ### Files
  - `HPArchipelago.u`: compiled UScript mod
  - `Default.ini`: pre-patched engine config (not needed to patch if the mod worked before)
  - `harry_potter_2_pc.apworld`: AP world (client bundled)
  - `PLAYER_SETUP.md`: install + first-run guide
v1.1.0.title: v1.1.0

v2.0.0.description:
# HP2PC_AP v2.0.0

Biggest release since v1.1.0: a second game mode, three new check categories worth of options, link protocols, traps, and an item-appearance overhaul.

## Highlights

- **Open castle mode (`game_mode: open_castle`). AKA Bingo** Full support for the HP2 Bingo community distribution: every level open from spawn, no precollected spells (all 7 spells enter the item pool). The mod auto-detects which install you launched, and pops a "WRONG INSTALL" warning toast every level if the running game does not match the seed's `game_mode`. `vanilla` remains the default.
- **Configurable open-castle goal.** Instead of the Basilisk fight, open castle completes by opening the Great Hall once you satisfy your goal clauses: `open_castle_goal_cards` (default 50), `open_castle_goal_spells` (7), `open_castle_goal_levels` (12), `open_castle_goal_duels` (off), `open_castle_goal_quidditch` (off). Clauses are AND'd; any left at 0/off drop out, with a fallback to "all 7 spells" so there is always a gate.
- **Item appearance overhaul.** Check markers now morph to look like the real item they hold (correct card/spell mesh and skin). Items belonging to other games in a multiworld show an AP-logo plate, with an arrow variant marking progression items.

## New options

- **`enable_spell_challenge_times`** (off): beating the replay par time ("Mastered") on each of the 4 spell challenges becomes a check.
- **`tradersanity`** (off): each non-Weasley card/ingredient vendor's first sale becomes an AP check, then reverts to selling normally. `price_vanilla` / `price_random` / `price_low` only change what that check costs.
- **`enable_traps`** (off) + **`trap_fill_percent`** (5-50, default 5): adds Bean Thief, Goyle Transformation, and Forgetfulness traps to the pool, replacing a slice of filler.
- **`ring_link`** (off): mirrors organic Bertie Bott's bean changes (pickups and vendor spending) to and from other RingLink slots in the room. AP-granted bean filler and the Bean Thief trap are not mirrored. Compatible with Sonic-style RingLink games.
- **`death_link`** (off): standard Archipelago DeathLink.
- **`vanilla_gate_levels`** (on): choose between vanilla's bookcase key-gating (story-order chain) and an everything-open layout. No effect in open castle.

## Improvements

- **All items are now durable.** Every item type (cards, spells, equipment, every bean tier, all other filler, and traps) survives a client crash, reconnect, or save-load, backed by a per-slot consumed-item ledger in Archipelago server storage. In v1.1.0 the Small/Medium/Large bean piles could be lost across a crash; that gap is closed. The only remaining way to lose an item is to receive it in-game and then reload an older save without saving first.
- Lots and lots of small things and improvements.

## Upgrade notes

- The same `HPArchipelago.u` works for both vanilla and HP2 Bingo installs; see the updated "Optional: install the HP2 Bingo distribution too" section in `PLAYER_SETUP.md`.
- Set `game_mode` to match the install you launch, or you will get the per-level warning toast and an uncompletable seed.
- Regenerate your YAML template (ArchipelagoLauncher to Generate Template Options) to pick up the new options.

## Release files

`HPArchipelago.u`, `Default.ini`, `harry_potter_2_pc.apworld`, `PLAYER_SETUP.md`. The Python client is bundled inside the apworld; there is no separate exe.
v2.0.0.title: v2.0.0

v2.1.0.description:
# HP2PC_AP v2.1.0

Polish and durability pass on top of v2.0.0. Tradersanity gets a proper "this is an AP check" affordance and two new tuning toggles, the open-castle goal now has live progress in both the client and the pause menu, high-stakes items survive autosave reverts, and Linux players finally get a packaged `.apworld`.

## Highlights

- **Tradersanity is now unmistakable in-game.** Every Tradersanity vendor's trade UI shows a top-of-screen "Archipelago Item" banner and replaces the trade-item icon with an AP-logo disc. With the new `tradersanity_hint_on_open` option, the banner reads `<player>'s <item>` so the room knows what each trader is holding before any beans change hands. Prices are now sticky per seed across level transitions and save/load (no more re-rolling on hub re-entry).
- **Open-castle progress at a glance.** New `/progress` client command prints a per-clause `[x]/[ ] have / need` summary toward the configured `open_castle_goal_*` clauses. The in-game pause menu shows the same panel, with each clause turning green when complete and seed-disabled clauses hidden.
- **Item durability hardened.** AP-granted spells, blocker keys, potion-ingredient keys, equipment, and cards now survive a mid-run autosave revert via an end-of-drain durability save, and restore on cold load via per-category resync messages. `SaveGame` no longer silently fails on the toast/watcher cross-package refs, so the consumed-item ledger reliably persists across quit/reload.
- **Linux build.** `gen_apworld.py` now invokes AP's "Build APWorlds" Launcher component to produce a cross-platform `harry_potter_2_pc.apworld` zip, so non-Windows players have a working install.

## New options

- **`tradersanity_hint_on_open`** (on): first time you open dialogue with an unchecked Tradersanity vendor, the AP check at that vendor is broadcast-hinted, and the in-game trade banner shows `<player>'s <item>`. No effect when `tradersanity` is off.
- **`skip_vendor_voices`** (off): silences every vendor's in-trade voice cues (sell / out-of-stock / transaction-done / decline / not-enough-beans / narrator / Harry-inquiry) so trades resolve instantly. The proximity lure line is left alone. Useful for Tradersanity runs where the same dialogue repeats.

## Improvements

- `enable_quidditch_upgrades` pulls Fred & George into the Tradersanity UX. They get the AP banner, the AP-logo trade icon, and the open-vendor hint alongside the 13 generic Tradersanity vendors.
- Cosmetic in-game toasts for DeathLink sent and received, room Join / Part / Goal events, and AP-server disconnect.
- Open-castle Gold Card Room opens at 20 silver cards instead of 40 (now in-logic), matching the in-game `CardLockTrigger` which only wires Lock1+Lock2. Vanilla still requires all 40.
- The Whomping Willow bookcase blocker has morphed, have a look!

## Fixes

- Cards in one-time-visit areas (Dumbledore's Study, Slytherin Common Room) now enter the bronze/silver vendor pool the moment their game-state gate opens, instead of being orphaned because the level cannot be re-entered.
- Fred & George stay open after you receive Nimbus 2001 / Quidditch Armour from another seed. Previously the equipment grant flipped a flag that locked them out of further sales.
- Spell-challenge LevelCompletion check now correctly requires picking up the FinalStar. Leaving the challenge level via the entrance door or the pause-menu Return-to-Hub button no longer credits the check.
- RingLink no longer phantom-broadcasts bean diffs from autosave reverts; DeathLink outbound is rate-limited to one broadcast per 5 seconds, so a sticky surface-effect death loop no longer spams the room.
- AP-granted spells auto-recover from a stale or empty durable record on reconnect, derived directly from the server's ReceivedItems replay.
- Game no longer crashes on the second buffered high-stakes grant of a session (dynamic-array clear regression).
- Vanilla logic fix: the three Hogwarts Entrance Hall ingredient vendors and several Diffindo Challenge per-location rules now match the routes the game actually honours.

## Upgrade notes

- v2.0.0 seeds do not work with this version of the mod or client.
- Regenerate your YAML template (ArchipelagoLauncher to Generate Template Options) to pick up `tradersanity_hint_on_open` and `skip_vendor_voices`. Existing yaml files keep working with the defaults.
- The save graph is cleaner now, but any old save that was already poisoned by the v2.0.0 cross-package refs (symptom: `Graph is linked to external private object APHUDToast Entry.APHUDToast0` in `Game.log` when saving) will not heal itself. Delete the affected `Save0.usa` and start a new save on that slot. A fresh save written with v2.1.0 in place is clean.

## Release files

`HPArchipelago.u`, `Default.ini`, `harry_potter_2_pc.apworld` & `PLAYER_SETUP.md`.
v2.1.0.title: v2.1.0

v2.2.0.description:
## v2.2.0

### **New**
- Sound randomizer: per-seed shuffle of in-game sound effects, with an optional no_footsteps mode that leaves Harry's footsteps unshuffled. Feedback cues (found-secret jingle, card pickups, AP toasts) are never randomized. Commands: /reroll_sounds, /restore_sounds.
- Music randomizer: per-seed shuffle of music and jingles via on-disk file swap, now covering cutscene and menu music. Jingles only swap with jingles. Commands: /reroll_music, /restore_music.
- Dialogue randomizer: shuffles voice lines within a single character or across all, with subtitles re-matched so captions read what you actually hear. Commands: /reroll_dialogue, /restore_dialogue.

### Changes
- Fred & George purchases now morph in place like the ingredient traders; the thrown Nimbus and Quidditch Armour keep their vanilla throw arc, so they no longer drop straight down and go missing (gated on quidditch upgrades).
- Recurring in-game toast while the mod is disconnected from the client.
- Client window now shows game connect/disconnect, and logs a loud error if the IPC listener port can't bind.
- Moved the game IPC port to 42779 so a local Archipelago server no longer blocks the listener.

### Fixes
- Vanilla seeds now force Lumos and Flipendo into starting spells, fixing frequent generation failures (~22% -> <1%).
- Fixed two open-castle logic bugs involving Flipendo.
- Inbound DeathLink now waits out a settle window so it can no longer fire mid-cutscene and break movement.
- Stuck ectoplasm is released so phase-through damage no longer persists.
- "Return to Entry Hall" button is hidden during cutscenes and the vanilla intro.
- Disconnect button now correctly reverts to Connect.
v2.2.0.title: v2.2.0

v2.3.0.description:
## Harry Potter 2 PC - Release v2.3.0

### **New**
- Press shift to run! Costs 4 beans per second, will send this to RingLink.
- More traps, and trap selection in the yaml.
  - This sadly makes this patch incompatible with the previous patch.

### Fixes
- Gryffindor challenge final star now collects the "Gryffindor challenge - Complete" location.
- Logic fixes for Card Po and Card Elphick in Open Castle mode.
- The "Return to entry hall" button now exits the current stage cleanly, preserving secrets collected, and all actor states (beans collected, chests opened, diffindo's cast, etc.).
- Dialogue randomizer's bump voice lines now have correct subtitles.
v2.3.0.title: v2.3.0

v2.4.0.description:
# HP2PC_AP v2.4.0

Reliability and correctness pass on top of v2.3.0.

## Highlights
- **Checks and the goal survive an AP outage.** The client re-sends unconfirmed checks and the mod replays its local ones on reconnect, all through the framework resend path. Goal completion replays too, and the item ledger merges on load instead of overwriting.
- **The Drowsiness Draught Trap can't be cheesed with Shift.** Sprint is disabled while the trap is active, so the slow sticks. Also covers the ectoplasm and spider-web slows.
- **The open-castle Great Hall endpoint is signposted once the goal unlocks.** A per-level toast points to it, and the goal panel and `/progress` then name it.

## Improvements
- Shift-to-run keeps its momentum through jumps, casts, and aiming, and a mid-air cast no longer cancels a fall.
- The Quidditch shop gains a Duelling Club logic path. Open castle needs the Duelling Key; vanilla needs the full duel chain.

## Fixes
- Beat Par Time no longer credits sub-par spell-challenge runs. The real end score is captured at final-star pickup, so the check and Report Card both read true.
- The duels and Quidditch goal rows show the full set size, not 1, so they no longer go green after one win.
- Open-castle logic corrections, including Rictusempra now required on Bicorn routes that need it.

## Upgrade notes
- No new yaml options, so existing yaml files keep working unchanged.
v2.4.0.title: v2.4.0

v2.5.0.description:
# HP2PC_AP v2.5.0

The client now launches the game for you.

## Changes

- **The client auto-launches the game.** On connect it starts the right `Game.exe` for the seed's mode by itself, a moment after any sound, music, or dialogue randomizer finishes writing. On by default; set `auto_launch_game: false` under `harry_potter_2_pc_options` in host.yaml to launch it yourself.
- **First connect asks once where the game is.** A folder picker prompts for the install that matches the seed's mode (the folder containing `system\Game.exe`) and saves it to host.yaml, so you are asked only once per mode. The same per-mode install folder feeds the audio randomizers.
- **New `/play` command.** Launches or relaunches the game on demand, handy if you closed it or turned auto-launch off.
- **Level ending checks are sent correctly.** Dying in a level no longer messes up the obtainability for the level end - complete check to be send.
- **Spell challenge timers are reset when exiting via the menu.** Just as all other vanilla exits do.

## Upgrade notes

- No new yaml options, so existing yaml files keep working unchanged.
v2.5.0.title: v2.5.0

v2.6.0.description:
# HP2PC_AP v2.6.0

Poptracker support! 

## Changes
- Split "Hogwarts" region into "Entry hall" and "Grand staircase".
- Expose variables in slot_data for the Poptracker.
v2.6.0.title: v2.6.0
